inputs.text: steampunk illustration of a wise owl professor wearing large ornate brass goggles, intricate exposed clockwork with visible gear teeth, fine etched engravings, filigree and copper piping, weathered brass patina, tiny rivets, each feather individually rendered with fine barbs and texture, layered graphic-novel linework with rich cross-hatching, warm amber and sepia palette with teal-green accents, glowing amber rim light, volumetric light, dramatic storybook lighting, hyper-detailed, ultra intricate
